g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the TracerProvider create spans for LLM calls?')
sendPrompt('Which gauge metrics does the MeterProvider emit?')
sendPrompt('What static scrubbing patterns are applied?')
sendPrompt('How does the API gateway resolve workspace_id?')
g.text: TLS, API key → workspace_id, rate limit

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the spans Kafka topic partitioned?')
sendPrompt('How is the metrics Kafka topic structured?')
sendPrompt('How does per-workspace prompt scrubbing work?')
sendPrompt('How does batch insert to ClickHouse work?')
sendPrompt('How does the metrics writer insert gauges?')

svg.text: Triggered on each insert into spans
